___COMMENT_WEAPONS: === TIER 1: BASE WEAPONS (common, starter shop, no giftPower) ===

dagger_base.name: Rusty Dagger
dagger_base.description: Left behind by someone who didn't make it. Quick, at least.

sword_base.name: Sword
sword_base.description: Reliable. Dull. +1 accuracy. Like its previous owner.

spear_base.name: Spear
spear_base.description: Long reach. Strike first, ask questions never.

mace_base.name: Mace
mace_base.description: Blunt. Heavy. Punches through armour. 15% stagger.

axe_base.name: Battle Axe
axe_base.description: Big. Slow. Hits like a falling tree. 20% stagger.

montors_peeling_knife.name: Montor's Peeling Knife
montors_peeling_knife.description: Still has potato on it. Also venom.

montors_pruning_shears.name: Montor's Pruning Shears
montors_pruning_shears.description: For the garden. Grows back sharper each time.

montors_candle_snuffer.name: Montor's Candle Snuffer
montors_candle_snuffer.description: Ironic. It puts out candles but sets everything else on fire.

montors_icicle.name: Montor's Icicle
montors_icicle.description: Snapped from the eaves. Never melts. Freeze them, then shatter them.

montors_nail_file.name: Montor's Nail File
montors_nail_file.description: Tiny. Vicious. He was very particular about his nails.

montors_cheese_wire.name: Montor's Cheese Wire
montors_cheese_wire.description: Thin. Silent. Cuts through anything. Leaves them seeing stars.

montors_umbrella.name: Montor's Umbrella
montors_umbrella.description: Hidden blade inside. Tipped with something green. He takes it everywhere.

montors_letter_opener.name: Montor's Letter Opener
montors_letter_opener.description: Silver. Monogrammed. Paper cuts that never heal.

montors_fireplace_poker.name: Montor's Fireplace Poker
montors_fireplace_poker.description: Still hot. Always hot. Sears on contact.

montors_ice_pick.name: Montor's Ice Pick
montors_ice_pick.description: Keeps the drinks cold. And the enemies.

montors_mums_bread_knife.name: Montor's Mum's Bread Knife
montors_mums_bread_knife.description: She could silence a room. So can this.

montors_sabatier.name: Montor's Sabatier
montors_sabatier.description: French. Precise. The flat of the blade rattles the skull.

montors_garden_fork.name: Montor's Garden Fork
montors_garden_fork.description: Prongs caked in compost. The compost is alive.

montors_fishing_spear.name: Montor's Fishing Spear
montors_fishing_spear.description: Barbed. What it catches, it keeps.

montors_toasting_fork.name: Montor's Toasting Fork
montors_toasting_fork.description: Made for crumpets. The prongs glow red.

montors_curtain_rod.name: Montor's Curtain Rod
montors_curtain_rod.description: Long reach. Cold brass. The curtains are on the floor now.

montors_broom_handle.name: Montor's Broom Handle
montors_broom_handle.description: Snapped in half. The jagged end does the talking.

montors_weathervane.name: Montor's Weathervane
montors_weathervane.description: Arrow-shaped tip. Ripped from the roof. One good crack to the temple.

montors_mums_ladle.name: Montor's Mum's Ladle
montors_mums_ladle.description: She stirred things best left unstirred. Something green drips from it.

montors_tenderiser.name: Montor's Tenderiser
montors_tenderiser.description: For meat. You're meat. The spikes leave marks.

montors_candlestick.name: Montor's Candlestick
montors_candlestick.description: Solid brass. Still lit. Colonel Montor. In the dungeon. With this.

montors_pestle.name: Montor's Pestle
montors_pestle.description: Marble. Cold to the touch. Grinds spices. Grinds bones.

montors_mums_rolling_pin.name: Montor's Mum's Rolling Pin
montors_mums_rolling_pin.description: She didn't need magic. Neither does this. The thud alone terrifies.

montors_door_knocker.name: Montor's Door Knocker
montors_door_knocker.description: Brass lion head. Knock knock. Lights out.

montors_woodsmans_axe.name: Montor's Woodsman's Axe
montors_woodsmans_axe.description: Sap-stained. The tree sap is toxic. So is everything in Montor's garden.

montors_cleaver.name: Montor's Cleaver
montors_cleaver.description: Kitchen grade. Butcher grade. The edge never dulls.

montors_coal_shovel.name: Montor's Coal Shovel
montors_coal_shovel.description: Full of embers. Swings like a cricket bat. Everything catches fire.

montors_pickaxe.name: Montor's Pickaxe
montors_pickaxe.description: Caked in frozen rock dust. Each hit cracks like permafrost.

montors_executioners_hatchet.name: Montor's Executioner's Hatchet
montors_executioners_hatchet.description: Ceremonial. Notched. They see it and they know what's coming.

montors_sledgehammer.name: Montor's Sledgehammer
montors_sledgehammer.description: Not subtle. Not fast. But nothing stays standing.

___COMMENT_HARDENED: === TIER 3: MONTOR'S HARDENED WEAPONS (strong stats, NO giftPower) ===

montors_skeleton_key.name: Montor's Skeleton Key
montors_skeleton_key.description: Opens anything. Including enemies. 40% double strike, 30% DEF ignore, +3 init.

montors_letter_knife.name: Montor's Letter Knife
montors_letter_knife.description: Silver. Perfectly balanced. 35% double strike, +2 init. A precision instrument.

montors_family_heirloom.name: Montor's Family Heirloom
montors_family_heirloom.description: His grandmother forged it. d8, +3 accuracy, 15% double strike. It hums when you hold it.

montors_sabatier_hardened.name: Montor's Hardened Sabatier
montors_sabatier_hardened.description: French steel, honed by dungeon air. d8, +3 accuracy, 15% DEF ignore.

montors_flagpole.name: Montor's Flagpole
montors_flagpole.description: Still has the flag on it. d8, +4 init. Always strikes first.

montors_lightning_rod.name: Montor's Lightning Rod
montors_lightning_rod.description: Ripped from the roof. Copper tip still hums. d8, +3 init, +1 accuracy, 20% DEF ignore.

montors_void_cleaver.name: Montor's Void Cleaver
montors_void_cleaver.description: Montor's personal mace. d8, 50% DEF ignore, 30% stagger. He's noticed it's missing.

montors_hardened_pestle.name: Montor's Hardened Pestle
montors_hardened_pestle.description: Marble. Reinforced. d8, 45% DEF ignore, 25% stagger. He ground spices with it. And other things.

montors_grandfather_clock_hand.name: Montor's Grandfather Clock Hand
montors_grandfather_clock_hand.description: The minute hand. Six feet of brass. d12, 20% DEF ignore, 30% stagger. Time stops for no one.

montors_hardened_cleaver.name: Montor's Hardened Cleaver
montors_hardened_cleaver.description: Tempered in the furnace. d12, 15% DEF ignore, 25% stagger. Cleaner cuts.

montors_mums_slipper.name: Montor's Mum's Slipper
montors_mums_slipper.description: Everyone feared it. d8, 50% DEF ignore, 50% stagger, guaranteed FEAR. No AGI penalty. She was fast.

montors_family_sword.name: Montor's Family Sword
montors_family_sword.description: His grandmother forged it. His mother wielded it. d10, +3 accuracy, 20% double strike, 25% DEF ignore. It sings.

shield_base.name: Shield
shield_base.description: A plank with a handle nailed on. 10% block. It's something.

wooden_shield.name: Bit of Wood
wooden_shield.description: A better plank. With a better handle. 15% block.

montors_pot_lid.name: Montor's Pot Lid
montors_pot_lid.description: Dented. Scorched. Blocks surprisingly well. 20% block.

montors_chopping_board.name: Montor's Chopping Board
montors_chopping_board.description: Knife marks everywhere. Splinters on impact. 15% block, BLEED on block.

montors_frying_pan.name: Montor's Frying Pan
montors_frying_pan.description: Cast iron. Still warm. 20% block, BURN on block.

montors_mirror_shield.name: Montor's Hand Mirror
montors_mirror_shield.description: They see themselves and hesitate. 15% block, DAZE on block.

montors_hardened_shield.name: Montor's Reinforced Tray
montors_hardened_shield.description: Hammered flat by the smith. +5 DEF, 30% block. A proper shield from improper materials.

leather_common.name: Tatty Leather
leather_common.description: Smells. Barely holds together. Better than nothing.

chainmail_common.name: Clanky Armour
chainmail_common.description: Loud. Heavy. Announces you to everything.

montors_welcome_mat.name: Montor's Welcome Mat
montors_welcome_mat.description: Wipe your feet. Or bleed on them.

montors_dressing_gown.name: Montor's Dressing Gown
montors_dressing_gown.description: Threadbare. Smells of pipe smoke. Somehow invisible.

health_potion.name: Dodgy Red Liquid
health_potion.description: Found in a cupboard. Unlabelled. Heals 15 HP somehow.

montors_marvelous_medicine.name: Montor's Marvellous Medicine
montors_marvelous_medicine.description: Unlabelled bottle. Could be anything. Montor swears it's fine.

greater_health_potion.name: Suspiciously Good Red Liquid
greater_health_potion.description: Thicker. Warmer. Heals 30 HP. Don't think about it.

montors_homebrew.name: Montor's Homebrew
montors_homebrew.description: Brewed in the cellar. Don't ask what's in it. Heals everything.

rage_draught.name: Angry Juice
rage_draught.description: Thick. Red. Tastes of iron. +4 STR for 3 turns.

smoke_bomb.name: Stink Pellet
smoke_bomb.description: Smells like the Cook's socks. Guaranteed escape.

antidote.name: Chalky Tablet
antidote.description: Found in the bathroom cabinet. Cures body conditions.

smelling_salts.name: Nasty Sniff
smelling_salts.description: One whiff and your head clears. Violently. Cures mind conditions.

montors_bath_bomb.name: Montor's Bath Bomb
montors_bath_bomb.description: Fizzy. Floral. Explosive. Not for baths.

montors_mums_smelling_salts.name: Montor's Mum's Smelling Salts
montors_mums_smelling_salts.description: Industrial strength. She used them on Montor as a boy.

montors_adrenaline_shot.name: Montor's Adrenaline Shot
montors_adrenaline_shot.description: Syringe from the medicine cabinet. Guaranteed crit next attack, +3 STR. Then the crash.

fortify_draught.name: Thick Gloop
fortify_draught.description: Drink it. Skin hardens. +4 DEF for 3 turns. Try not to think about the texture.

tonic_str.name: Montor's Beef Broth
tonic_str.description: Thick. Meaty. +3 STR for 4 turns. Made from something.

tonic_agi.name: Montor's Nettle Tea
tonic_agi.description: Stings the tongue. +3 AGI for 4 turns. Move faster, think faster.

tonic_per.name: Montor's Eye Drops
tonic_per.description: Burns. Then everything sharpens. +3 PER for 4 turns.

tonic_int.name: Montor's Brain Tonic
tonic_int.description: Fizzy. Tastes of metal. +3 INT for 4 turns. Conditions land harder.

tonic_lck.name: Montor's Gran's Cordial
tonic_lck.description: Gran's secret recipe. +3 LCK for 4 turns. Everything goes your way.

tonic_all.name: Montor's Mum's Sunday Roast
tonic_all.description: Somehow still warm. +2 all stats for 3 turns. She'd be proud.

montors_grans_perfume.name: Montor's Gran's Perfume
montors_grans_perfume.description: One spray clears the room. 12 damage to all enemies. She wore it to church.

montors_pepper_pot.name: Montor's Pepper Pot
montors_pepper_pot.description: Shake vigorously. Everyone sneezes. All enemies BLINDED.

montors_stink_bomb.name: Montor's Stink Bomb
montors_stink_bomb.description: Found under his bed. All enemies NAUSEOUS. Even you feel a bit off.

montors_flash_powder.name: Montor's Flash Powder
montors_flash_powder.description: From the workshop. BANG. All enemies DAZED. Your ears ring.

montors_mums_cooking_wine.name: Montor's Mum's Cooking Wine
montors_mums_cooking_wine.description: Heal 20 HP, +2 STR for 3 turns. She put it in everything.

montors_ice_cube_tray.name: Montor's Ice Cube Tray
montors_ice_cube_tray.description: Throw the whole tray. All enemies FROZEN. Brittle and slow.

montors_mustard_gas.name: Montor's Mustard Jar
montors_mustard_gas.description: English mustard. Industrial strength. All enemies POISONED.

montors_firecracker.name: Montor's Firecracker
montors_firecracker.description: Left over from bonfire night. 6 damage to all enemies. Small but loud.

montors_mums_hairspray.name: Montor's Mum's Hairspray
montors_mums_hairspray.description: Flammable. Very flammable. 8 damage + BURN to all enemies. Don't use near candles.

montors_bucket_of_water.name: Montor's Bucket of Water
montors_bucket_of_water.description: Splash. Cures ALL your conditions. Cold. Refreshing. Undignified.

montors_protein_shake.name: Montor's Protein Shake
montors_protein_shake.description: Permanently +1 STR. Thick. Gritty. You feel stronger immediately.

montors_yoga_mat.name: Montor's Yoga Mat
montors_yoga_mat.description: Permanently +1 AGI. A quick stretch. Surprisingly effective.

montors_multivitamin.name: Montor's Multivitamin
montors_multivitamin.description: Permanently +1 VIT (+5 max HP). Chalky. His mum made him take one every morning.

montors_reading_glasses.name: Montor's Reading Glasses
montors_reading_glasses.description: Permanently +1 PER. Everything's sharper. He left them on the nightstand.

montors_sudoku_book.name: Montor's Sudoku Book
montors_sudoku_book.description: Permanently +1 INT. Half-finished. You complete a few puzzles.

montors_lucky_horseshoe.name: Montor's Lucky Horseshoe
montors_lucky_horseshoe.description: Permanently +1 LCK. Hung above his door. Upside down, which explains a lot.

montors_shield_polish.name: Montor's Shield Polish
montors_shield_polish.description: Permanently +1 DEF. Rub it in. Skin toughens. Smells of beeswax.

montors_mums_recipe_book.name: Montor's Mum's Recipe Book
montors_mums_recipe_book.description: Permanently +1 STR, VIT, DEF. Her cooking made you stronger. Literally.

montors_grans_wisdom.name: Montor's Gran's Wisdom
montors_grans_wisdom.description: Permanently +1 INT, PER, LCK. She knew things. Now you know them too.

montors_signet_ring.name: Montor's Signet Ring
montors_signet_ring.description: +15 max HP. His seal. Worn smooth.

montors_garden_charm.name: Montor's Garden Charm
montors_garden_charm.description: Heals 2 HP per new chamber. A pressed flower in resin.

montors_greenhouse_key.name: Montor's Greenhouse Key
montors_greenhouse_key.description: Heals 4 HP per new chamber. The vines still grow around it.

montors_lucky_penny.name: Montor's Lucky Penny
montors_lucky_penny.description: +2 LCK. Better loot and crits. Found in the fountain.

montors_thimble.name: Montor's Thimble
montors_thimble.description: Crits on 19+. His mum used it for sewing. And threats.

montors_mums_wedding_ring.name: Montor's Mum's Wedding Ring
montors_mums_wedding_ring.description: 10% lifesteal. She never took it off. The ring remembers.

montors_grans_lottery_ticket.name: Montor's Gran's Lottery Ticket
montors_grans_lottery_ticket.description: If any d20 matches your numbers, you win something rare.

montors_monocle.name: Montor's Monocle
montors_monocle.description: See exact enemy HP. Knowledge is half the battle.

montors_loaded_dice.name: Montor's Loaded Dice
montors_loaded_dice.description: Ones become twos. He cheats at everything.

montors_magnifying_glass.name: Montor's Magnifying Glass
montors_magnifying_glass.description: Weapon conditions apply twice on hit.

montors_last_stand_brooch.name: Montor's Last Stand Brooch
montors_last_stand_brooch.description: +1 DEF per 20% HP missing. Pinned to his coat the day he built the dungeon.

montors_nudge.name: Montor's Nudge
montors_nudge.description: +1 to all d20 rolls. A gentle push from Montor. He's watching.

montors_chaos_marble.name: Montor's Chaos Marble
montors_chaos_marble.description: All dice shift randomly by -2 to +2. Could save you. Could doom you. Montor loves it.

montors_compass.name: Montor's Compass
montors_compass.description: +2 PER. Points somewhere. Not north. Better searches, better inspections.

montors_mums_apron.name: Montor's Mum's Apron
montors_mums_apron.description: +2 to all junk pile search rolls. She could find anything.

montors_coin_purse.name: Montor's Coin Purse
montors_coin_purse.description: +25% gold from all sources. Jingles suspiciously.

montors_plaster.name: Montor's Plaster
montors_plaster.description: 25% BLEED resist. Slightly sticky. Better than nothing.

montors_mums_bandage.name: Montor's Mum's Bandage
montors_mums_bandage.description: 50% BLEED resist. She always had one ready.

montors_tourniquette.name: Montor's Tourniquette
montors_tourniquette.description: 75% BLEED resist. Tight. Professional. She was a nurse before Montor.

montors_blood_ward.name: Montor's Blood Ward
montors_blood_ward.description: 100% BLEED immunity. Your blood stays inside. Always.

montors_herb_sachet.name: Montor's Herb Sachet
montors_herb_sachet.description: 25% POISON resist. Smells of lavender and denial.

montors_herb_pouch.name: Montor's Herb Pouch
montors_herb_pouch.description: 50% POISON resist. Dried garden herbs. Smell awful.

montors_antivenom_vial.name: Montor's Antivenom Vial
montors_antivenom_vial.description: 75% POISON resist. Milked from his own snakes. Apparently.

montors_bile_ward.name: Montor's Bile Ward
montors_bile_ward.description: 100% POISON immunity. Nothing toxic can reach you.

montors_spark_guard.name: Montor's Spark Guard
montors_spark_guard.description: 25% BURN resist. A wire mesh glove. Smells of soot.

montors_oven_mitt.name: Montor's Oven Mitt
montors_oven_mitt.description: 50% BURN resist. Scorched but functional. His mum's.

montors_fire_blanket.name: Montor's Fire Blanket
montors_fire_blanket.description: 75% BURN resist. Rolled up under the kitchen sink.

montors_ember_ward.name: Montor's Ember Ward
montors_ember_ward.description: 100% BURN immunity. Fire finds someone else.

montors_woolly_hat.name: Montor's Woolly Hat
montors_woolly_hat.description: 25% FROST resist. Itchy. Hand-knitted by Gran.

montors_thermal_vest.name: Montor's Thermal Vest
montors_thermal_vest.description: 50% FROST resist. M&S. Surprisingly effective against magical cold.

montors_hot_water_bottle.name: Montor's Hot Water Bottle
montors_hot_water_bottle.description: 75% FROST resist. Still warm after centuries. She made it for him.

montors_frost_ward.name: Montor's Frost Ward
montors_frost_ward.description: 100% FROST immunity. Cold can't find you.

montors_comfort_blanket.name: Montor's Comfort Blanket
montors_comfort_blanket.description: 25% FEAR resist. Threadbare. Smells of childhood.

montors_nightlight.name: Montor's Nightlight
montors_nightlight.description: 50% FEAR resist. He's had it since he was small.

montors_teddy_bear.name: Montor's Teddy Bear
montors_teddy_bear.description: 75% FEAR resist. One eye missing. Still fiercely protective.

montors_void_ward.name: Montor's Void Ward
montors_void_ward.description: 100% FEAR immunity. The dark can't find you.

montors_first_aid_kit.name: Montor's First Aid Kit
montors_first_aid_kit.description: 25% BLEED + POISON resist. Plasters, herbs, and hope.

montors_hazmat_gloves.name: Montor's Hazmat Gloves
montors_hazmat_gloves.description: 50% POISON + BURN resist. From the workshop. Yellow rubber.

montors_winter_coat.name: Montor's Winter Coat
montors_winter_coat.description: 50% FROST + FEAR resist. Warm and reassuring. Smells of pipe smoke.

montors_mums_medicine_cabinet.name: Montor's Mum's Medicine Cabinet
montors_mums_medicine_cabinet.description: 50% resist to BLEED, POISON, and BURN. She was prepared for everything.

montors_anxiety_blanket.name: Montor's Anxiety Blanket
montors_anxiety_blanket.description: 50% resist to FEAR, DAZE, and CHARM. All mind conditions. Weighted.

montors_hazard_suit.name: Montor's Hazard Suit
montors_hazard_suit.description: 35% resist to ALL conditions. Sealed. Uncomfortable. Extremely effective.
